name: ui-pinball-board
description: PinballBoard — retro pinball: ball hits bumpers for points, paddles keep it alive. game-shell + canvas-2d with live input wiring (TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK/BUMPER_HIT + selectedUnitId/validMoves) and a score/balls HUD.

schema.name: ui-pinball-board
schema.description: PinballBoard — retro pinball: ball hits bumpers for points, paddles keep it alive. game-shell + canvas-2d with live input wiring (TILE_CLICK/UNIT_CLICK/BUMPER_HIT + selectedUnitId/validMoves) and a score/balls HUD.

emits.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click
Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click
Emits when the ball strikes a bumper
Emits when the audio toggle is pressed

events.name: Tile Click
events.description: Emits UI:{tileClickEvent} with { x, y } on tile click

events.name: Unit Click
events.description: Emits UI:{unitClickEvent} with { unitId } on unit click

events.name: Bumper Hit
events.description: Emits when the ball strikes a bumper

events.name: Toggle Audio
events.description: Emits when the audio toggle is pressed

assetBaseUrl.label: Asset Base Url
assetBaseUrl.description: Base URL prepended to manifest sprite paths

features.label: Features
features.description: Features (bumpers, paddles, etc.) on the board

frameCount.label: Frame count
frameCount.description: Number of sprite frames a unit cycles through before the animation loops.
